title: Extracting Dates from a String
scenario: Write a prompt to extract dates from a given string. The string may contain multiple dates in different formats. The output should be a list of extracted dates.

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the code adheres to Python 3 syntax and is correctly formatted.
Verify if the code meets the character limit and uses the correct language syntax.
Check if the code correctly extracts the dates from the given string.
